li.t-if: page_name == 'quote' or sale_order and sale_order.state in ('sent', 'cancel')

li.t-elif: page_name == 'order' or sale_order and sale_order.state not in ('sent', 'cancel')

t.t: Follow, view or pay your orders

t.div: There are currently no quotations for your account.
There are currently no sales orders for your account.

t.t-value: sale_order.invoice_ids.filtered(lambda i: i.state not in ['draft', 'cancel']).sorted('date', reverse=True)

a.t-elif: sale_order._has_to_be_paid() or ( payment_amount and sale_order.amount_paid < sale_order.amount_total and sale_order.state != 'cancel' )
a.t-att-class: 'btn btn-primary' if not sale_order.transaction_ids else 'btn btn-light'

t.t-if: not sale_order.signature and sale_order._has_to_be_paid() and not payment_amount

div.class: o_download_pdf d-flex gap-2 flex-lg-column flex-xl-row flex-wrap

div.h5: Want to import this document in Odoo?
div.p: Drag and drop the request for quotation PDF file into your list of quotations in Odoo. Enjoy the automation!
Use the above REST URL to get structured data of the purchase order in UBL format. Read the documentation to learn all the ways to connect your software with Odoo.

div.h5: You don't use a good CRM software?
div.p: Start on Odoo, it's 100% free! You'll save time creating beautiful quotations and track sales.

t.classes.f: col-lg-4 col-xl-3 d-none d-lg-block d-print-none order-lg-first
t.title: title

div.t-elif: not sale_order._has_to_be_signed() and sale_order._has_to_be_paid() or (payment_amount and sale_order.state != 'cancel')
div.name: sale_order_modal_validate

main.p: Tell us why you are refusing this quotation, this will help us improve our services.

div.t: Your order has been signed but still needs to be paid to be confirmed.

div.div: Your order is not in a state to be rejected.

div.a: Contact us to get a new quotation.
Contact us to get a new quotation.

div.class: d-none d-lg-flex flex-column gap-2 w-100 w-lg-50 mx-auto my-5 d-print-none
d-lg-none mt-4 p-3 rounded-3 border d-print-none

t.t-value: sale_order._has_to_be_paid() or (payment_amount and sale_order.amount_paid < sale_order.amount_total and sale_order.state != 'cancel')

div.class: o_portal_mobile_action_bar d-flex d-lg-none flex-column position-fixed bottom-0 start-0 end-0 pt-1 bg-white border-top shadow d-print-none

t.t-if: not sale_order.is_expired and sale_order.state in ['draft', 'sent'] and advantage_tax_incl < 0

span.class: ms-auto d-inline-flex align-items-center gap-1 small text-nowrap text-success

t.t-if: not sale_order.signature and sale_order._has_to_be_paid() and not payment_amount

main.span:
By signing, you confirm acceptance on behalf of
for the quote.

main.div:
By paying a down payment of
(%),
By paying,
By paying,
you confirm acceptance on behalf of
for the quote.
The order is not in a state requiring customer payment.

template.name: Sales Order Portal Pay Modal Amounts Selector

div.class: d-flex flex-row flex-grow-1 flex-shrink-1 flex-basis-0 min-w-0
d-flex align-items-center gap-1 text-muted small flex-wrap
d-flex flex-column align-items-end flex-grow-1 flex-shrink-1 flex-basis-0 min-w-0

div.t-if: sale_order.get_portal_last_transaction() and not invoices and sale_order.state in ('sent', 'sale') and portal_confirmation == 'pay' and not success and not error

section.class: p-0 p-lg-3 pt-lg-0 rounded-bottom border-start border-end border-bottom

t.t-value: not hide_taxes_details and any(line._has_taxes() for line in lines_to_report)

div.t-attf-class: d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center py-2 px-3 fw-bold border-bottom {{ 'bg-200' if is_section_m else 'bg-100' }}

div.class: fst-italic py-2 px-3 border-bottom text-muted small
d-flex justify-content-between align-items-start py-3 px-3 border-bottom fw-bold
d-flex flex-wrap align-items-baseline gap-1 mt-1 small text-muted
d-flex flex-wrap align-items-center gap-2 mt-1 small text-muted

th.t-attf-class: text-end text-nowrap {{ 'd-none d-sm-table-cell' if report_type == 'html' else '' }}

t.t-value: 3 if current_subsection else (2 if current_section else 0)

tr.name: tr_section
tr.t-attf-class: {{'o_line_section bg-200' if is_section else 'o_line_subsection bg-100'}} fw-bold

t.t-value: ( ( is_section or not line.parent_id.collapse_prices ) and not line.is_downpayment )
3 + (1 if display_discount else 0) + (1 if display_taxes else 0)

td.name: td_section_name_xs
td.t-att-colspan: section_name_colspan - 1 - (1 if display_discount else 0) - (1 if display_taxes else 0)

td.name: td_combo_subtotal
td.t-att-colspan: 2 + (1 if display_discount else 0) + (1 if display_taxes else 0)

img.class: o_sale_portal_product_image d-none d-lg-inline me-2 rounded object-fit-cover
